channel.title: Research on Intelligent Modeling Laboratory (IML)
channel.description: Recent content in Research on Intelligent Modeling Laboratory (IML)

item.title: 3D-IC Thermal Design
item.description: Fast thermal simulation for early-stage 3D-IC design, hotspot prediction, and cooling optimization.

item.title: Data-Driven Wake Modeling
item.description: LLM-GP-based surrogate modeling for wind turbine wakes and wake interaction in wind farms.

item.title: Tensor-Train Decomposition
item.description: A scalable parallel Tensor-Train Decomposition method for efficiently compressing and analyzing massive multidimensional data.

item.title: Equation Discovery
item.description: Data-driven discovery of mathematical models for physical phenomena.

item.title: Scalable Iterative Solvers
item.description: Scalable iterative solvers for large-scale sparse matrices.

item.title: AI for Science
item.description: Foundation and surrogate models for scientific workflows.
